profile.name: Mahesh Bahadur
profile.title: Senior Staff Engineer
profile.summary: Senior Staff Engineer with 13+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable, high-performance web platforms across genealogy, payments, real estate, healthcare and logistics domains. Expert in cloud-native distributed systems using React, Node.js and AWS. Experienced technical leader driving architecture decisions, mentoring engineers and improving engineering productivity using AI-assisted tooling.

experience.description: Architect and lead development of scalable marketing and content platforms serving high-volume web traffic for Ancestry.
Developed platform capabilities powering developer documentation and API reference delivery for PayPal.
Designed and delivered full stack geospatial platform supporting property import, visualization and management.

experience.role: Senior Software Engineer / Team Lead / Software Engineer
experience.description: Delivered enterprise applications across healthcare, logistics and energy domains for clients Novartis, FedEx and Itineris respectively.

projects.name: Visual Testing Platform
projects.description: Scalable visual regression testing platform that detects UI changes through automated screenshot comparison.

projects.name: Content Admin Tool
projects.description: Content governance platform enabling controlled content configuration, approval workflows and environment-based deployments.

projects.name: Content Targeting Platform
projects.description: Server-side content personalization platform integrating Adobe Target SDK to securely deliver targeted experiences.

projects.name: Real Estate Mapping Platform
projects.description: Full stack geospatial application enabling property visualization, editing and export capabilities.

highlights: Designed asynchronous execution pipeline using AWS SQS and distributed Node workers
Implemented pixel level visual comparison engine
Stored snapshot baselines in AWS S3
Used SNS notifications for real time execution updates
Multi stage approval workflow for product and engineering stakeholders
Environment aware deployment to STAGE and PROD
Server side personalization integration with Adobe Target

achievements: Customer Champion award for Visual Testing Platform
Reduced API load by 40% through distributed caching
Winner of Berkadia Hackathon for Augmented Reality innovation
aiExperience: Built internal GenAI tools for multilingual content translation
Automated pull request review using AI-assisted analysis
Improved developer productivity using AI-generated unit tests

architecture.description: Distributed visual regression testing platform using Playwright and asynchronous execution pipelines.
architecture.diagram:
graph LR
A[Git PR Trigger] --> B[Playwright Test Runner]
B --> C[Screenshot Capture]
C --> D[S3 Storage]
D --> E[Visual Diff Engine]
E --> F[Result Dashboard]
E --> G[SNS Notification]
metrics: Reduced manual UI regression effort by 80%
Accelerated CI feedback cycle from hours to minutes
Enabled parallel execution across distributed workers
Improved release confidence for UI-heavy applications

architecture.description: Server-side personalization system integrating Adobe Target SDK.
architecture.diagram:
graph LR
A[User Request] --> B[Node Targeting Service]
B --> C[Adobe Target]
B --> D[Content Repository]
C --> E[Personalized Response]
metrics: Centralized targeting logic for multi-site deployments

architecture.description: Geospatial platform for property visualization and editing.
architecture.diagram:
graph LR
A[Property Data Import] --> B[Node API]
B --> C[MySQL Storage]
C --> D[React Map UI]
D --> E[Property Visualization]
metrics: Reduced property data import time by 40%
Improved map rendering performance for large datasets
Enabled faster property visualization workflows for analysts
